understanding and planning for the future; option is practice and is
                                                                                                                        an application of financial technology. Strategic option is an impor-
                                                                                                                        tant technical and ideal support for the scientific development plan-
                                                                                                                        ning. In the process of planning the development of a region or a
                                                                                                                        sector, we should take full account of the actual and potential
                                                                                                                        strengths of the region and rationally use its credit support
                                                                                                                        demanded by large-scale construction so as to attain the goal of
                                                                                                                        avoiding risks and speeding up development. Development-oriented
                                                                                                                        finance uses strategic options to achieve the profit and loss in the
                                                                                                                        overall balance in the process of support for the local and major
                                                                                                                        industrial development, while in the meantime using the continu-
                                                                                                                        ous financial arrangements to resolve the problem of the realization
                                                                                                                        of a sustainable long-term investment returns and profits in order
                                                                                                                        to support economic and social sustainable development.
